props.name: avatarUrl
props.description: URL for the main avatar image displayed on the card

props.name: iconUrl
props.description: Optional URL for an icon pattern overlay on the card background

props.name: grainUrl
props.description: Optional URL for a grain texture overlay effect

props.name: innerGradient
props.description: Custom CSS gradient string for the inner card gradient

props.name: behindGlowEnabled
props.description: Toggle the smooth radial glow that follows the cursor behind the card

props.name: behindGlowColor
props.description: CSS color for the behind-the-card glow (e.g. rgba/hsla/hex)

props.name: behindGlowSize
props.description: Size of the glow as a length/percentage stop in the radial gradient

props.name: className
props.description: Additional CSS classes to apply to the card wrapper

props.name: enableTilt
props.description: Enable or disable the 3D tilt effect on mouse hover

props.name: enableMobileTilt
props.description: Enable or disable the 3D tilt effect on mobile devices

props.name: mobileTiltSensitivity
props.description: Sensitivity of the 3D tilt effect on mobile devices

props.name: miniAvatarUrl
props.description: Optional URL for a smaller avatar in the user info section

props.name: handle
props.description: User's handle or username (displayed with @ prefix)

props.name: contactText
props.description: Text displayed on the contact button

props.name: showUserInfo
props.description: Whether to display the user information section

props.name: onContactClick
props.description: Callback function called when the contact button is clicked
